defaultLocale.description: Hide YouTube related videos, shorts, comments, suggestions wall, homepage recommendations, trending, and other distractions.
defaultLocale.creator: Unhook

defaultLocale.name: Turn Off the Lights
defaultLocale.description: The entire page will be fading to dark, so you can watch the videos as if you were in the cinema. Works for YouTube™ and beyond.
defaultLocale.creator: Stefan vd

locales.name: Keera tuled välja
locales.description: Kogu lehekülg tumeneb, et saaksid vaadata videosid, nagu oleksid kinos. Töötab nii YouTubeiga™ kui ka teistega.

locales.name: Turn Off the Ligths
locales.description: A página irá desvanecer por completo de forma a que veja os vídeos como se estivesse no cinema. Funciona com o Youtube e outros sites.

locales.name: Turn Off the Lights

locales.name: Turn Off the Lights

locales.name: Turn Off the Lights

locales.name: Turn Off the Lights

locales.name: Изключване на осветлението

156/5000
